org.apache.dubbo.rpc.cluster

接口 Cluster

  • 所有已知子接口:
    Cluster
    所有已知实现类:
    AbstractCluster, AvailableCluster, BroadcastCluster, BroadcastCluster2, FailbackCluster, FailfastCluster, FailoverCluster, FailsafeCluster, ForkingCluster, MergeableCluster, MockClusterWrapper, ZoneAwareCluster

    @SPI(value="failover")
public interface Cluster
    Cluster. (SPI, Singleton, ThreadSafe)

    Cluster Fault-Tolerant
